text: A systematic review of LLMs in education (ScienceDirect 2025) analyzing 200+ studies found that LLM-powered tutoring systems improve learning outcomes by 15-30% across subjects — personalized feedback, adaptive question generation, and real-time explanation being the most effective interventions.

GenMentor (ACM 2025) — an LLM-powered multi-agent tutoring framework — uses specialized agents for curriculum planning, knowledge assessment, and personalized explanation generation, achieving goal-oriented learning paths that adapt to individual student knowledge gaps.
